programme.title: Putrabadhu
programme.desc: The members of a joint family go through various ups and downs in their lives and attempt to stay together despite all the odds stacked against them.

programme.title: Aamar Boss
programme.desc: Animesh, an owner of a publishing house, struggles to balance his professional and personal life. However, things change, when his elderly mother starts working in his company.

programme.title: Boudi Canteen
programme.desc: Poulami leaves her job as a teacher in order to turn her love for cooking into a business. However, she must strive to not let her aspirations get crushed under the expectations of society.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E1466 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: M80 Moosa
programme.desc: Follow the life of Moosa, a fisherman who lives with his wife and two children and faces a lot of exciting and comedic paradoxes in his day-to-day life with family & work.

programme.title: Govinda Naam Mera
programme.desc: Govinda Waghmare, who is stuck with his controlling wife, seeks love from his gorgeous girlfriend which leads him into a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Jeena Isi Ka Naam Hai
programme.desc: Alia, an aspiring writer, marries a brutal and abusive prince to put an end to her family's misery. She runs away from him and starts a new life when he orders someone to kill their unborn girl child.

programme.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programme.desc: Friends Gopal, Lucky, Madhav and Laxman often dupe gullible people out of their money. Hilarity ensues when they target a middle-aged couple and simultaneously try wooing their beautiful neighbour.

programme.title: Lootera
programme.desc: In 1953, Pakhi, an aristocrat's daughter, falls in love with an archaeologist. However, unbeknownst to her, he leads a double life that threatens their relationship.

programme.title: Made in China
programme.desc: Raghuveer Mehta, a failing businessman, travels to China for some work. During the trip, he hatches a plan to sell an aphrodisiac that enhances men's sexual health in India.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: David and Monty, estranged half-brothers, train in mixed martial arts to earn a livelihood. However, things change when the two are forced to compete against each other in the final tournament.

programme.title: Heyy Babyy
programme.desc: Three handsome Sydney bachelors Aroush, Tanmay and Al - are having the time of their lives in Sydney. They flirt around, sleep around and have numerous 'gorgeous' conquests to their credit.

programme.title: Bhagam Bhag
programme.desc: Champak and his theatre troupe travel to London for a show. However, their plans go awry when they accidentally become pawns in a murder and drug conspiracy.

programme.title: Dangal
programme.desc: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former wrestling champion, dedicates himself to transforming his daughters, Geeta and Babita, into elite wrestlers.

programme.title: The Dirty Picture
programme.desc: Reshma, a village girl, achieves immense success in the male-dominated film industry. However, as her career rises, she pays a heavy price for it.
